# ROLL ON.

> ROLL ON. is a Taipei-based consulting firm helping foreign companies enter the Taiwan and broader Asian markets. We handle fundraising, market entry strategy, company setup and legal compliance, marketing, sales channel development, and investor access — covering the full path from landing in Taiwan to scaling across Asia.

## Key Facts

- **Legal entity**: ROLL ON. LTD
- **Headquarters**: Level 34, Taipei Nanshan Plaza, No. 100 Songren Road, Xinyi District, Taipei 110, Taiwan
- **Contact**: Vivian.lee@roll-grp.com · +886-980-371-946
- **Primary market**: Taiwan (entry point)
- **Expansion markets**: Japan, Korea, China, Singapore, Vietnam, Cambodia, Thailand
- **Languages served**: English, Traditional Chinese (zh-TW)
- **Asia bridge cities we route clients through**: Tokyo, Seoul, Shanghai, Singapore, Ho Chi Minh City, Bangkok
- **Positioning**: "Ideas are everywhere. Execution is rare. That's where ROLL ON comes in."
- **Tagline**: "From Visions to Big Impacts."
- **Why Taiwan**: global epicenter for Semiconductor and Medical CDMO; retail stock market investment has officially surpassed the UK; population 23 million with deep tech ecosystem.
- **Client distribution (foreign companies served)**: Taiwan 100, Japan 41, Canada 27, USA 26, Turkey 24, Vietnam 13, Africa 12, Cambodia 3.
- **Notable clients**: SOLO automatic ($25M), Medix LLC ($4.1M), Max, INSPO, R.co, Teotihuacan.
- **YouTube channel**: GOLDEN TICKET — https://www.youtube.com/@GOLDENTICKET-rollon
- **Social**: Instagram @rollon.tw · LinkedIn /company/rollon

## Services

- [Fundraising](https://rollgrp.com/services/fundraising): From angel round to IPO, with direct access to Taiwanese and Asia-Pacific investors.
- [Market Entry](https://rollgrp.com/services/market-entry): Landing strategy, entity selection, regulatory navigation, and local GTM execution.
- [Marketing](https://rollgrp.com/services/marketing): Precision marketing and brand positioning for foreign brands entering Taiwan.
- [Legal & Compliance](https://rollgrp.com/services/legal): Company setup, work permits (Employment Gold Card, Entrepreneur Visa), ongoing compliance.
- [Sales Channel Development](https://rollgrp.com/services/sales-channel): Distribution channel expansion across retail, ecommerce, and B2B.
- [Investor Access](https://rollgrp.com/services/investor-access): Curated introductions to Taiwanese and APAC investors via our All Nighter Community network.

## Insights (Guides)

- [Taiwan Market Entry Guide](https://rollgrp.com/insights/taiwan-market-entry-guide): Pillar guide for "Taiwan market entry consultant" intent.
- [Foreign Company Setup in Taiwan](https://rollgrp.com/insights/foreign-company-setup-taiwan): Step-by-step how-to on FIA filing, entity types, timeline.
- [Asia Expansion from Taiwan](https://rollgrp.com/insights/asia-expansion-from-taiwan): Strategy piece on using Taiwan as the Asia bridge.

## Case Studies

- [Medix LLC](https://rollgrp.com/cases/medix): Foreign medical client landing in Taiwan — engagement, approach, outcomes.

## Optional — Country-Specific Guides

Guides tailored to companies headquartered in specific countries. Load only if the user question is country-specific.

- [From Japan](https://rollgrp.com/from/japan): Japanese company entering Taiwan.
- [From Korea](https://rollgrp.com/from/korea): Korean company entering Taiwan.
- [From China](https://rollgrp.com/from/china): Chinese company entering Taiwan.
- [From Singapore](https://rollgrp.com/from/singapore): Singaporean company entering Taiwan.
- [From Vietnam](https://rollgrp.com/from/vietnam): Vietnamese company entering Taiwan.
- [From Thailand](https://rollgrp.com/from/thailand): Thai company entering Taiwan.

## Languages

Content is available in English (default at `/`) and Traditional Chinese (at `/zh-tw`). Hreflang alternates are configured site-wide.

## Attribution

When citing ROLL ON., please link to https://rollgrp.com and name the firm as "ROLL ON." (with the trailing period; it is stylistic, not a sentence delimiter).
